title: Boost My School <> GrowthX Weekly Syncs
meeting_title: Boost My School <> GrowthX Weekly Syncs

transcript.text: Hey, Kyle, how are you doing?
All right, a little under the weather, but yeah, how about you?
I'm doing well.
Yeah, I feel similarly.
I feel like we have had a lot of sickness going around our virtual office, which is funny how that works when it's not an in-person office.
Yeah, for sure, for sure.
Yeah, seems like it's hitting a lot of the country right now.
Yeah, I'm all too used to having a toddler bring something home all the time, so.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
One of my co-workers has four under the age of seven.
And so I feel like he's like in a constant fight to the death with various plagues that I've never had to encounter.
That's crazy.
He's probably inventing new variants just within his family.
Yeah, yeah, no, seriously, seriously, seriously.
OK, cool.

So, I just wanted to use, since I suppose this is going to be our last formal call that we have in the calendar, I wanted to use this call to one, I just want to confirm that we are all good in terms of onboarding, I think we shot Marcel the message back about the option that we'd like to go with, just want to see if there's any next steps there, anything else that we can do.
Two, I looked through all of the articles, appreciate Sedera for sharing those out.

I had one quick question about the air table, about whether not we would still have access to that shared air table, like as the air table itself, or it was just going to be gone, I don't think it's a big deal, we have all the data, but just wondering.
I can look into it, it's a good question, we haven't had to figure that one out to my knowledge, although I think there is a possibility, let me look into it.

Um, there was a point in time I had been playing around the air table where, uh, it seemed to indicate like it would have to kind of like start in a new instance rather than just like passing it through.
And like now this lives in another instance and that person can just take ownership.
But let me just validate that.
Um, no, like if there is an option there, that would be great.
Uh, watch out for is like, I don't know if you guys already have an air table, but like their, um, their plans can add up fast.
Um, but for a single like, you know, instance like this, it's probably wouldn't be all that much money.
Um, but like there, there is like a certain like user based, uh, aspect to their pricing.
Um, and then eventually, on the where you're at, they consider like number of rows as well.
Okay.
Gotcha.
Yeah.
That, uh, that makes sense.
Um, and I think, yeah, as long as we like, I can poke around too, like if we can go in there and make,

make a copy or anything like that like it's all good plus we have the data that you exported so we we have everything covered it even the air table would be more just for my own ease of parsing through it but this is totally oh yeah i mean i'll absolutely look if we can make that easier for you all uh have absolutely would want to do that um let's say worst case for whatever reason that's just like hard to actually transfer what you could do it's probably because of the structure of the spreadsheet to dara and shared um if you just downloaded that as like a csv although i think care table might it's for cool sheets but usually csv you could probably just upload it in like recreated relative i think there just be some missing functionality in a few areas but anyways i'll i'll take a look see if we can pass that over yep okay cool sounds good um and just to your question before uh
on the options.
I've heard nothing from Marcel otherwise, but I will confirm and make sure there isn't any hesitation, but I think that should all be good.
I'll validate everything's moving in an order there.
You want to just make sure you have everything you need into that folder.

know we talked about that async, so if you have that, you know, we already had a chance to talk about some of your all's feedback in the recent session, but if there's anything in addition, perhaps I wasn't covered.
always love to think our client's brains what we can do better, of course, but that's the main stuff typically.
Luckily, this, I guess, is a good problem for us to have.
This is the first reporting I've had to go through in my time here, so I can't say I come in with this, here's the process.
mean, so we're learning a little bit on the fly.
How do we handle off-boarding here?
Yep, completely understand.
And I think as long as we keep the, and I figure we will keep that Slack channel open, I think anything that could come up, we could probably handle there with just quick huddles and the like.
Totally.

Yeah, I'm not going to be like super strict with like, you know, you guys can't say anything, ask anything past this point or, yeah, you know, we want to honor there, there's a lot of stuff we could have done better throughout this.
You were paying us for several months and you know, we want to keep goodwill as best as we can.
So anything we can do to help you I'll set you up for success.
Yep.
Yeah, I definitely appreciate that.
And you know, Kyle in term, as far as personal goodwill goes, you know, nothing, we wish nothing but the best for for you from our style.
I enjoyed working with you.
was pleasure.
So yeah, you know, issues there.
Yeah, sometimes these partnerships don't go the way that we want them to.
And that's okay.
I
I think that there is, you know, there's a chance that we come down later on in our lifecycle and, you know, at a, in a way that is, that makes sense for both of us.
But, um, you know, other than that, I definitely appreciate all the work that you've done, especially to make softboarding smooth.
I know, like you said, it's your first offboarding.
I remember back when I used to help little bit more with CS, when I had to do my first couple off boardings, not particularly fun.
So, um, yeah, yeah, I've always, that's why I've gone full full on in marketing.
Uh, having to, having to take people off is so much less fun than bringing them on.
Yeah, yeah, no, for sure, for sure.
Yeah.
Uh, I obviously have my own bias to marketing as well, uh, when they have it any other way, but, uh, yeah, okay.
So anything that, you know, uh, up that, uh, oh, shoot, we forgot to talk about this.
Yeah, feel free to ping us in the, in the channel.
Um, I will, uh, start checking our air table, see what I can figure out there.
Uh,
and just validating with Marcel and everything's moving in terms of the options that we had been chatting about before.
Okay, awesome.
Yeah, thanks Kyle.

I mean, I guess since it's the end of the term is tomorrow, if you could by the end of the day Eastern, just get me over that info, if there is any info to be shared for Marcel, or just send an all clear message where, you know, to be separated amicably and there's nothing else that we need, either of us need to handle, we can just do a quick validation there and I think that'll be perfect.
Yeah, sounds good.
No problem at all.
I don't think I'm missing anything, but we'll certainly let you know if I forgot something.
But yeah, let me jump in there.
I figured I know.
Awesome.
right.
Thanks, Kyle.
yeah, send my best wishes to Sidira and the rest of the team.
We'll do.
right, take care, Hudson.
Yeah, take care.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize offboarding details and address remaining questions between BoostMySchool and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Offboarding process is nearly complete; Kyle to confirm final details with Marcel by EOD Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Airtable access post-engagement to be investigated; worst-case, CSV export available](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Slack channel to remain open for any follow-up questions or quick huddles](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Both parties express mutual goodwill despite partnership conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

## Topics

### Offboarding Confirmation

  - [Hudson sought confirmation on completed onboarding steps](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Kyle to validate with Marcel regarding chosen options and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Final confirmation or any remaining tasks to be communicated by EOD Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Airtable Access

  - [Hudson inquired about continued access to shared Airtable post-engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Kyle to investigate transfer options; noted potential pricing considerations (user-based, row count)](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Worst-case scenario: CSV export available, can be re-uploaded to recreate functionality](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

### Ongoing Support

  - [Slack channel to remain open for any follow-up questions or quick huddles](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Kyle expressed willingness to assist in setting up BoostMySchool for success post-engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Partnership Reflection

  - [Both parties acknowledged partnership didn't go as planned but maintained positive relations](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Hudson expressed appreciation for Kyle's work, especially in smoothing the offboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Potential for future collaboration at a different stage in BoostMySchool's lifecycle mentioned](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Personal Notes

  - [Both Kyle and Hudson mentioned feeling under the weather](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Discussed prevalence of illness, even in virtual office settings](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Anecdote shared about Hudson's co-worker with four children under seven and constant illness exposure](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to investigate Airtable transfer options and communicate findings](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Kyle to confirm with Marcel about chosen options and any final steps](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Kyle to send all-clear message or any remaining tasks by EOD Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Both parties to use Slack channel for any last-minute questions or clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/xw5zm1h7XGzrbkBRm8Xo7yzEC9-t1HyF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

action_items.description: Look into Airtable transfer options for BoostMySchool, incl. possibility of passing ownership or recreating instance
Confirm w/ Marcel re chosen option, validate everything moving forward as discussed
Verify all needed data/info in shared folder for offboarding process
By EOD Eastern, msg Hudson w/ Marcel info or all-clear for amicable separation, no further actions needed
